description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the fpco/stack-build Docker image. Define two stages: install_deps and deploy. In the install_deps stage add an install_dhall job that caches and artifacts the bin directory, runs `if [ -f bin/dhall-to-text ]; then exit; fi`, `stack setup`, `stack install dhall-1.8.0 dhall-text`, `mkdir bin`, and `cp $(which dhall-to-text) bin`. In the deploy stage add a pages job that generates a static site by running `mkdir .public`, `echo './Index/generate-index ./Index/lectures' | ./bin/dhall-to-text > .public/index.html`, and `mv .public public`, then publishes the public/ folder as a GitLab Pages artifact. The pipeline has no additional triggers.
